By enabling clean hydrogen production in the Complex of PecÃ©m, this initiative places the Brazilian state at the forefront of the global clean energy transition, while also promoting jobs, inclusion, and long-term climate resilience.

Located in the state of CearÃ¡, in Northeastern Brazil, CIPP is a major industrial and logistics hub and a leading location for the development of a hydrogen hub in the country. It is strategically positioned to drive an energy transition, supported by both the State and Federal Government.
